description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chair featuring a rectangular, cushioned seat and backrest upholstered in a rich brown material, likely faux leather or vinyl. The seat and backrest are supported by a slender, black metal frame with four straight legs, giving the chair a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The backrest is slightly angled for ergonomic support, while the seat is flat and spacious, suitable for comfortable sitting. There are no armrests, emphasizing a streamlined and functional design ideal for public or waiting areas. The chair's materials and construction suggest durability and easy maintenance, making it suitable for high-traffic urban environments. Its overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, blending well with both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern brown cushioned chair with a black metal frame, featuring a rectangular seat and backrest without armrests. Its minimalist design is both sturdy and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular brown seat and backrest, with four black metal legs visible and no armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled backrest and the thickness of the seat cushion, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the brown backrest and the simple black frame, with all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat and backrest profile and two supporting legs.
